name: Banco do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul S.A.
summary: Banco do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul S.A., a multiple-service bank, provides a range of banking products and services primarily in Brazil, Miami, and the Grand Cayman. The company operates through Retail, Payroll Correspondents, and Corporate segments. The Retail segment provides funding and lending operation services for individuals, as well as micro, small, and medium-sized entities. The Payroll Correspondents segment offers payroll loans. The Corporate segment manages products and services related to fundraising; and provides commercial lending, long-term, rural, mortgages, and foreign exchange loans for government entities, and medium and large size companies. The company also provides securities brokerage services; credit cards; and insurance and pension products, as well as manages sales poll groups. In addition, it acts as an economic and financial agent for the state of Rio Grande do Sul. Further, the company is involved in the investment, development, leasing, and foreign exchange activities. It serves customers through a network of 518 branches. Banco do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul S.A. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Porto Alegre, Brazil.
